allow_open.description: Determines whether the server TLS policy allows connections without a valid TLS certificate; set to true to permit non-TLS traffic, otherwise false.

description.description: Defines an optional description for the Server TLS Policy, providing additional context or details. Limited to 512 characters.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the resource, supporting filtering and management; must comply with label key and value constraints.

location.description: Specifies the region where the Server TLS Policy will be created; must match the location of the associated resources.

mtls_policy.description: Defines the mutual TLS authentication policy for the server, specifying client certificate requirements and validation settings.
mtls_policy.type: list(object({client_validation_mode: optional(string),client_validation_trust_config: optional(string),client_validation_ca: list(object({certificate_provider_instance: list(object({plugin_instance: string})),grpc_endpoint: list(object({target_uri: string}))}))}))

name.description: Unique identifier for the Server TLS Policy, must be 1-63 characters long and comply with RFC1035.

server_certificate.description: Specifies the server certificate to use for TLS, must be a valid Google Cloud certificate resource or reference.

timeouts.description: Specifies the time durations for create, update, and delete operations on the TLS policy.
